tasks.title: Refactor ScaffoldWithNavBar to own AppBar + gear icon
tasks.description: ScaffoldWithNavBar takes ownership of the full Scaffold including AppBar. Add title resolution logic based on current route. Add gear icon (Icons.settings_outlined) to AppBar actions that navigates to /settings. Handle route-aware FAB: show budget add FAB on /budgets, transaction add FAB on all other tabs.
acceptanceCriteria: Gear icon visible on all tab screens
Tapping gear navigates to Settings screen
Title resolves correctly: DailySpend, Wallets, Budgets, Reports
FAB on /budgets shows budget add, all others show transaction add

tasks.title: Refactor child screens to body-only (Home, Wallets, Budgets)
tasks.description: Remove Scaffold and AppBar from HomeScreen, WalletsScreen, and BudgetsScreen. Each screen returns only its body content. Remove the account_circle icon from HomeScreen (replaced by shared gear icon). Move BudgetsScreen FAB logic to ScaffoldWithNavBar route-aware handling.
acceptanceCriteria: All 3 screens render correctly without own Scaffold
No duplicate AppBars
HomeScreen no longer has account_circle icon
BudgetsScreen add-budget FAB still works via ScaffoldWithNavBar

tasks.title: Add Reports route + nav tab
tasks.description: Add /reports GoRoute to ShellRoute at tab index 3. Add Reports _NavBarItem (icon: bar_chart) where Settings tab used to be. Update _calculateSelectedIndex to include reports index. Create minimal placeholder ReportsScreen (body-only widget) for initial wiring.
acceptanceCriteria: Reports tab visible at index 3 in bottom nav
Tapping Reports tab navigates to /reports
Tab highlight works correctly
Placeholder screen renders

tasks.title: Move Settings to non-shell full-screen route
tasks.description: Remove /settings from ShellRoute children. Add /settings as a top-level GoRoute (non-shell) with /settings/categories as a child route. SettingsScreen keeps its own Scaffold + AppBar (with back button auto-provided by GoRouter). Remove Settings _NavBarItem from bottom nav. Update _calculateSelectedIndex to remove settings index.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings no longer in bottom nav
Settings accessible via gear icon in AppBar
Settings renders full-screen with back button
/settings/categories still navigable and functional

tasks.title: Create Reports providers (reports_providers.dart)
tasks.description: Create features/reports/providers/reports_providers.dart with 5 providers: previousPeriodTransactionsProvider (computes previous period dates from selectedPeriodProvider, streams transactions), dailySpendAggregateProvider (Map<DateTime, double> from expenses in base currency), categorySpendProvider (List<CategorySpend> with name, colour, amount, percentage), trendSpendProvider (List<TrendPoint> cumulative daily spend), periodComparisonProvider (PeriodComparison with currentTotal, previousTotal, absoluteDiff, percentDiff).
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 providers return correct data for current period
previousPeriodTransactionsProvider computes correct previous period
categorySpendProvider sorted by amount descending
trendSpendProvider returns cumulative data points
periodComparisonProvider handles empty previous period gracefully

tasks.title: Build SpendBarChart widget
tasks.description: Create features/reports/widgets/spend_bar_chart.dart using fl_chart BarChart. X-axis: days within selected period (auto-label every Nth day). Y-axis: spend amount in base currency. Bars colored with theme.colorScheme.primary. Touch: show tooltip with exact date + amount.
acceptanceCriteria: Bar chart renders with one bar per day
X-axis labels auto-space based on period length
Touch tooltip shows date + amount
Empty state handled gracefully

tasks.title: Build SpendTrendLineChart widget
tasks.description: Create features/reports/widgets/spend_trend_line_chart.dart using fl_chart LineChart. Single smooth line showing cumulative spend over time. Gradient fill below the line. Touch: show tooltip with date + cumulative amount.
acceptanceCriteria: Line chart renders cumulative spend trend
Gradient fill below line renders correctly
Touch tooltip shows date + cumulative total
Empty state handled gracefully

tasks.title: Build PeriodComparisonCard widget
tasks.description: Create features/reports/widgets/period_comparison_card.dart. Two side-by-side cards showing 'This Period' and 'Previous Period' totals. Below: row showing absolute difference and % change. Green = spent less (with down arrow), Red = spent more (with up arrow). Handle edge case: no previous data → show 'No data'.
acceptanceCriteria: Two cards display current and previous period totals
Delta row shows correct absolute and percentage difference
Color coding: green for decrease, red for increase
Handles missing previous period data

tasks.title: Build CategorySpendList widget
tasks.description: Create features/reports/widgets/category_spend_list.dart. Each row: colored circle + category name + amount + percentage + linear progress indicator. Sorted by amount descending. Tapping a row opens CategoryTransactionsSheet (reused from home). Empty state if no categories.
acceptanceCriteria: Categories listed sorted by spend amount descending
Each row shows colored dot, name, amount, percentage
Linear progress bar shows % of total
Tapping a category opens CategoryTransactionsSheet
Empty state handled

tasks.title: Assemble ReportsScreen with all widgets
tasks.description: Replace the placeholder ReportsScreen with the full implementation. Body-only widget (no Scaffold) using CustomScrollView with slivers: PeriodSelector, PeriodComparisonCard, CategoryDonutChart (reused from home), SpendBarChart, SpendTrendLineChart, CategorySpendList, SizedBox(80) for FAB clearance.
acceptanceCriteria: All widgets render in correct order
PeriodSelector controls all charts
CategoryDonutChart reused and functional with drill-down
Scrolling is smooth with no overflow
FAB clearance at bottom

tasks.title: Delete orphan files + empty directories
tasks.description: Delete 7 orphan files: core/providers/database_provider.dart, data/models/expense.dart, data/models/category.dart, data/database/database_service.dart, services/export_helper_stub.dart, services/export_helper_web.dart, services/export_helper_native.dart. Remove empty directories: data/models/, data/database/, data/, services/, providers/. Do NOT delete features/budgets/utils/mock_data.dart.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 files deleted
All 5 empty directories removed
mock_data.dart still exists
No broken imports (verified via build)

tasks.title: Remove _PlaceholderScreen + /expenses/:id route
tasks.description: Delete the _PlaceholderScreen class and the /expenses/:id GoRoute from app_router.dart. These are dead code — the placeholder was never used by real features.
acceptanceCriteria: _PlaceholderScreen class removed
/expenses/:id route removed
No remaining references to PlaceholderScreen

tasks.title: Remove OptionalAuthGuard from backend
tasks.description: Remove the OptionalAuthGuard class from apps/api/src/auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard.ts (lines 7-18). Keep JwtAuthGuard intact. Verified: OptionalAuthGuard is never imported or used anywhere else.
acceptanceCriteria: OptionalAuthGuard class removed from jwt-auth.guard.ts
JwtAuthGuard still functional
No broken imports in backend

tasks.title: Update remaining-tasks.md — mark Phase 1 complete
tasks.description: Update docs/exec-plans/active/remaining-tasks.md to mark Phase 1 (T1-T4) as complete. Change '[ ]' to '[x]' for the Phase 1 header and all 4 tasks (T1: Move Settings to gear icon, T2: Add Reports tab + screen, T3: Remove orphan files, T4: Remove unused OptionalAuthGuard).
acceptanceCriteria: Phase 1 header marked [x]
All 4 Phase 1 tasks marked [x]
All sub-items under each task marked [x]
